H1B Salary Search — data pipeline steps
=======================================

Diagrams (PNG) under docs/diagrams/: Architecture-HighLevel.png, Data Model.png, ETL.png

Run from repo root: ./scripts/run_pipeline.sh

Step 1 — Parse LCA Excel → parsed_output.csv
  python3 scripts/data_parsing.py

Step 2 — Build local D1 export + distinct employer/job pairs
  python3 scripts/create_db.py
  After data load + indexes, applies (if present):
    scripts/openrefine_employer_name_updates.sql
    scripts/openrefine_job_title_updates.sql
  Outputs: h1b_wages_export.sql, distinct_employer_job_pairs.txt

Step 3 — Build suggestions index for /api/suggest (Worker + R2)
  python3 scripts/build_suggestions_index.py
  Output: public/suggestions_index.json

Step 4 — Upload suggestions JSON to local R2 (automatic after step 3)
  ./scripts/run_pipeline.sh runs: ./scripts/upload_suggestions_to_r2.sh --local
  Re-run manually if upload failed: ./scripts/upload_suggestions_to_r2.sh --local

Step 5–6 — Production deploy (when ready)
  ./scripts/run_pipeline.sh --prod
  Runs: Step 4 (local R2) + load_d1_replace.sh (D1) + upload_suggestions_to_r2.sh --remote (prod R2)

Manual prod R2 upload only (index already built):
  ./scripts/upload_suggestions_to_r2.sh --remote

Notes
-----
- Parquet / DuckDB-WASM client suggestions have been removed; autocomplete uses /api/suggest only.
- suggestions_index.json is gitignored; build it locally or in CI before deploy.
